name: SAL.Gen_Bounded_Definite_Queues

documentation.description:
Abstract:

A generic queue, allowing definite non-limited item types.

Size is maximum number of items in the queue.

subtypes.name: Size_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Size_Type is Peek_Type range 1 .. Peek_Type'Last / 2;

documentation.description: The upper limit is needed to avoid overflow in Peek.

subprograms.name: Add
subprograms.code: procedure Add (Queue : in out Queue_Type; Item : in Item_Type)

documentation.description: Add Item to the tail of Queue.

subprograms.name: Add_To_Head
subprograms.code: procedure Add_To_Head (Queue : in out Queue_Type; Item : in Item_Type)

documentation.description: Add Item to the head of Queue.

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code: function Count (Queue : in Queue_Type) return Base_Peek_Type

documentation.description: Returns count of items in the Queue
Remove head item from Queue, discard it.

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: function Get (Queue : in out Queue_Type) return Item_Type

subprograms.name: Is_Empty
subprograms.code: function Is_Empty (Queue : in Queue_Type) return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns true if no items are in Queue.

subprograms.name: Is_Full
subprograms.code: function Is_Full (Queue : in Queue_Type) return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns true if Queue is full.

subprograms.name: Peek
subprograms.code: function Peek (Queue : in Queue_Type; N : Peek_Type := 1) return Item_Type

documentation.description:
Return a copy of a queue item, without removing it. N = 1 is
the queue head.

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: procedure Put (Queue : in out Queue_Type; Item : in Item_Type)

subprograms.name: Remove
subprograms.code: function Remove (Queue : in out Queue_Type) return Item_Type

subprograms.name: Remove
subprograms.code: procedure Remove (Queue : in out Queue_Type; Item : out Item_Type)

documentation.description: Remove head item from Queue, return it.
